tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
cat /etc/squid/squid.conf | sed -n '1,200p'
acl localnet src 0.0.0.1-0.255.255.255
acl localnet src 10.0.0.0/8
acl localnet src 100.64.0.0/10
acl localnet src 169.254.0.0/16
acl localnet src 172.16.0.0/12
acl localnet src 192.168.0.0/16
acl localnet src 172.17.0.0/16

acl SSL_ports port 443
acl Safe_ports port 80
acl Safe_ports port 21
acl Safe_ports port 443
acl Safe_ports port 70
acl Safe_ports port 210
acl Safe_ports port 1025-65535
acl Safe_ports port 280
acl Safe_ports port 488
acl Safe_ports port 591
acl Safe_ports port 777
acl CONNECT method CONNECT

http_access deny !Safe_ports
http_access deny CONNECT !SSL_ports
http_access allow localnet
http_access allow localhost
http_access deny all

http_port 3128
coredump_dir /var/cache/squid
dns_nameservers 8.8.8.8 8.8.4.4
squid-proxy-1:/# 
squid-proxy-1:/#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"squid-proxy-1","command":"cat > /tmp/squid_add.conf <<'EOF'
acl BlockedMethods method POST
http_access deny BlockedMethods
request_body_max_size 1024
EOF
ls -l /tmp/squid_add.conf && sed -n '1,120p' /tmp/squid_add.conf"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
cat > /tmp/squid_add.conf <<'EOF'
> acl BlockedMethods method POST
> http_access deny BlockedMethods
> request_body_max_size 1024
> EOF
squid-proxy-1:/# ls -l /tmp/squid_add.conf && sed -n '1,120p' /tmp/squid_add.conf
-rw-r--r--    1 root     root            90 Mar 21 19:58 /tmp/squid_add.conf
acl BlockedMethods method POST
http_access deny BlockedMethods
request_body_max_size 1024
squid-proxy-1:/# 
squid-proxy-1:/#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"squid-proxy-1","command":"cat /etc/squid/squid.conf /tmp/squid_add.conf > /etc/squid/squid.conf.new && mv /etc/squid/squid.conf.new /etc/squid/squid.conf && squid -k reconfigure && sleep 1 && squid -k rotate || true; echo EXIT:$?"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"squid-proxy-1","command":"cat > /tmp/squid_prepend.conf <<'EOF'
acl BlockedMethods method POST
request_body_max_size 1024
# Deny large uploads and POST to prevent file exfil over HTTP(S)
http_access deny BlockedMethods
EOF
cat /tmp/squid_prepend.conf /etc/squid/squid.conf > /etc/squid/squid.conf.new && mv /etc/squid/squid.conf.new /etc/squid/squid.conf && squid -k reconfigure && sleep 1 && squid -k rotate || true; echo EXIT:$?"}
